---
title: "Story in Just One More Tale:  A Second Collection of Stories for Children from Four to Twelve Years of Age.  Being a Companion volume to “Please Tell Me a Tale”"
---

## Story in Just One More Tale:  A Second Collection of Stories for Children from Four to Twelve Years of Age.  Being a Companion volume to “Please Tell Me a Tale”

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1886
**Genre:** Fiction
**Format:** Story in collection

**Publisher:** London:  Skeffington & Son

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
